text: AMBER v2 measured mean force-close rate = 0.809 — worse than the v1 baseline (~0.75), so the rewrite's per-runner-credit claim to reduce fc rate is unsupported.

text: Operator reframe: force close is a crutch we put in because the models weren't closing trades — perhaps that points to an architectural issue.
Success bar: mean fc_rate ≤ 0.30 on eval day 2026-04-28 AND ≥4/12 agents positive eval day_pnl (vs AMBER v2's 0.809 fc and 2/12).
